source: ## Pay by Prime API (request HTML table, code-block Format/Header, Response table)

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: Header authentication key (YourPartnerKey). x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.

parameters.name: prime
parameters.description: The one time token returned from getPrime. Expires after 90 seconds. You can use test prime for test in sandbox environment.

parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

parameters.name: merchant_group_id
parameters.description: Merchant management settings on the portal. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, transaction price should times 100.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: The item amount or points that are excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Transaction currency (ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g., TWD).

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: A self-defined identifier for each transaction. Doesn't allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Must be unique. Recommended to define yourself to avoid error 421: gateway time out.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance.

parameters.name: cardholder
parameters.description: Information of the cardholder. Feeds the Fraud Detector and 3-D Secure risk verification.

parameters.name: cardholder.phone_number_country_code
parameters.description: Phone number country code (default 886). Do not include symbols, e.g., '+'.

parameters.name: cardholder.phone_number
parameters.description: Cardholder phone number. Must comply with the E.164 format.

parameters.name: cardholder.name
parameters.description: Name

parameters.name: cardholder.name_en
parameters.description: If name_en is blank, a default value will be forwarded.

parameters.name: cardholder.email
parameters.description: Cardholder email address. Must conform to RFC 5322.

parameters.name: cardholder.zip_code
parameters.description: Zip code number

parameters.name: cardholder.address
parameters.description: Billing address

parameters.name: cardholder.national_id
parameters.description: National ID

parameters.name: cardholder.member_id
parameters.description: The member ID of the buyer or cardholder. Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: cardholder.bank_member_id
parameters.description: Member ID of the cardholder or consumer. Required for binding transaction on e-payments.

parameters.name: cardholder_verify
parameters.description: Authentication Fields for KYC. Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: cardholder_verify.phone_number
parameters.description: Whether to verify phone number

parameters.name: cardholder_verify.national_id
parameters.description: Whether to verify national id

parameters.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
parameters.description: The merchant id can only do authentication except authorization.

parameters.name: instalment
parameters.description: Number of intervals of payments. Default 0. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: delay_capture_in_days
parameters.description: Days between bank authorization and capture. Default 0. Use -1 to disable automatic capture.

parameters.name: three_domain_secure
parameters.description: Enable 3D Secure authentication. Default false. Only applicable to Direct Pay.

parameters.name: result_url
parameters.description: Transaction result notification URL. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions (when three_domain_secure = true).

parameters.name: result_url.frontend_redirect_url
parameters.description: Frontend redirect URL of the merchant. Must start with https. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

parameters.name: result_url.backend_notify_url
parameters.description: Backend notify URL. Must start with https and only supports port 443. Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

parameters.name: result_url.go_back_url
parameters.description: URL of the Go back button in the TapPay Payment Error page.

parameters.name: redeem
parameters.description: Whether to use the redeem. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: remember
parameters.description: Whether to store this payment method. If true, response returns card_secret (card_key and card_token) for future Pay by Card Token transactions.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data will be encrypted and decrypted when other customization requirements.

parameters.name: event_code
parameters.description: A code defined by the bank, E-Wallet and merchants. Support: Easy Wallet.

parameters.name: product_image_url
parameters.description: The picture of the store or the product on the pay page.

parameters.name: jko_pay_insurance_policy
parameters.description: JKOPAY insurance details of property and life insurance transaction. Support: JKOPAY.

parameters.name: store_id
parameters.description: Store branch ID. If supported by the acquirer, forwarded.

parameters.name: store_name
parameters.description: Store name. If supported by the acquirer, forwarded.

request.description: JSON request body. Headers: Content-Type: application/json, x-api-key: YourPartnerKey. Sandbox: https://sandbox.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-prime ; Production: https://prod.tappaysdk.com/tpc/payment/pay-by-prime

responses.description: Transaction result. status=0 indicates success; see response field table (rec_trade_id, bank_transaction_id, auth_code, card_secret{card_key,card_token}, amount, currency, card_info, etc.). HTTP status code not stated by source; 200 assumed for the success response.

missing: No response example (only a response field table)
HTTP status code for the response is not stated (errors conveyed via body status/msg); 200 assumed
